cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.desc: A dependable horizontal cut. Always ready.

quake_edge.name: Quake Edge
quake_edge.desc: An earth-charged blade drop that splits stone.

pommel_strike.name: Pommel Strike
pommel_strike.desc: Cracks armor: sunders DEF (-25%) for 3 rounds.

bulwark_stance.name: Bulwark Stance
bulwark_stance.desc: Brace: the next hit taken is halved.

earthsplitter.name: Earthsplitter
earthsplitter.desc: Kaede's heaviest swing. Slow, seismic, decisive.

iron_resolve.name: Iron Resolve
iron_resolve.desc: Steady breath. Restores 20% of her max HP.

whirlwind_edge.name: Whirlwind Edge
whirlwind_edge.desc: A spinning cut that strikes every enemy.

crag_fissure.name: Crag Fissure
crag_fissure.desc: Slams the flat of the blade like a falling boulder.

gaia_break.name: Gaia Break
gaia_break.desc: Heavy terra cut that also sunders DEF for 3 rounds.

tempered_edge.name: Tempered Edge
tempered_edge.desc: Hones her edge: +25% ATK for 3 rounds.

double_tap.name: Double Tap
double_tap.desc: Two quick rounds. Twice the chances to find a weak spot.

volt_rounds.name: Volt Rounds
volt_rounds.desc: Two electrified slugs that bite through wet hides.

piercing_slug.name: Piercing Slug
piercing_slug.desc: A single overcharged shot that punches deep.

ricochet.name: Ricochet
ricochet.desc: One bullet, every enemy. Geometry is a weapon.

pistol_whip.name: Pistol Whip
pistol_whip.desc: Grip reversed — for things bullets just annoy.

snap_focus.name: Snap Focus
snap_focus.desc: Breathe out, line up: +25% ATK for 3 rounds.

storm_barrage.name: Storm Barrage
storm_barrage.desc: Three volt shots in a heartbeat. Weak-spot fishing.

aimed_shot.name: Aimed Shot
aimed_shot.desc: A patient, placed round. No flourish, all damage.

thunder_caliber.name: Thunder Caliber
thunder_caliber.desc: Riko's big iron. A thunderclap with a trigger.

covering_fire.name: Covering Fire
covering_fire.desc: Suppresses the field: an ally's next hit taken is halved.

jab_cross.name: Jab Cross
jab_cross.desc: The fundamentals, thrown hard. Always ready.

blazing_fist.name: Blazing Fist
blazing_fist.desc: An ignited straight that leaves the target burning (3 rounds).

skull_crusher.name: Skull Crusher
skull_crusher.desc: An overhand bomb. Skeletons hate her.

counter_stance.name: Counter Stance
counter_stance.desc: Invites the hit — answers the next attack on her with a strike.

inner_flame.name: Inner Flame
inner_flame.desc: Stokes the furnace: +25% ATK for 3 rounds.

rising_knee.name: Rising Knee
rising_knee.desc: An ember-trailing knee that lifts them off the ground.

ashen_flurry.name: Ashen Flurry
ashen_flurry.desc: Three burning blows. Great for probing weak spots.

volcanic_rush.name: Volcanic Rush
volcanic_rush.desc: Closes the distance inside a plume of cinders.

searing_grip.name: Searing Grip
searing_grip.desc: White-hot clinch that warps armor: sunders DEF for 3 rounds.

wave_bolt.name: Wave Bolt
wave_bolt.desc: A compact sphere of pressured water. Always ready.

tidal_crush.name: Tidal Crush
tidal_crush.desc: Drops a column of seawater like a hammer.

healing_rain.name: Healing Rain
healing_rain.desc: A soft rain restores 18% max HP to the active party.

undertow.name: Undertow
undertow.desc: Drags every enemy through a churning current.

renewal.name: Renewal
renewal.desc: Concentrated mending: heals one ally for 35% max HP.

mist_veil.name: Mist Veil
mist_veil.desc: Wraps the party in mist: everyone's next hit taken is halved.

riptide.name: Riptide
riptide.desc: A hooking current that pulls them off balance.

pressure_jet.name: Pressure Jet
pressure_jet.desc: A needle of water that cuts like a lance.

blessing_depths.name: Blessing of the Depths
blessing_depths.desc: Deep-sea blessing: one ally gains +25% ATK for 3 rounds.

maelstrom.name: Maelstrom
maelstrom.desc: Mizuki's storm-heart: a whirlpool engulfs every enemy.

bs_seismic_slam.name: Seismic Slam
bs_seismic_slam.desc: The Colossus shakes the whole arena.

bs_crush.name: Crush
bs_crush.desc: A bronze fist the size of a door.
